/CAL:TO CLARIFY CTS/DAWT/X:COURT RECEIVED A FAX FROM SAN QUENTIN STATE PRISON WANTING TO VERIFY THECTS IN SCN #198709 COURT #2243759,/X:THE 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON SENTENCE IN SCN#198709 COURT# 2243759 IS TO RUN CONSECUTIVETO THE SENTENCE IN COURT #2092107 SCN#188726,/X:AS OF 11-06-06 THE SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3),/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 650 ACTUAL DAYS PLUS 324 LOCAL CONDUCT CREDITS FOR A TOTAL CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 974 DAYS IN SCN#198709 COURT# 22437590/X:ANAMENDED ABSTRACT WILL BE PREPARED FOR COURT # 2243759 SCN# 198709/

/CAL:CLARIFY CTS/X:DEFEDANT & BOTH COUNSELS ARE NOT IN COURT,/X:THIS CASEWAS ADDED ON CALENDER TO CLARIFY THE CTS AS REQUESTED BY SAN QUENTIN PRISON,/X:VIA PHONE, BETSY WOLKIN REQUESTED TO CONTINUE THE MATTER ON 01-04-08//CONTD: CLARIFY CTS/

/AJW/CH1:SP 8M:M /DNA/STATES/SECFEE/VF5:200/PAR/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMEDSERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/X:THE SENTENCE OF 8 MONTHS IN CASE # 2243759 IS ONE THIRD OF THE MIDTERM AND IS TO RUN CONSECUTIVE TO THE 2 YEARS BASE TERM IN CASE #2092107 FOR A TOTAL OF 2 YEARS 8 MONTHS/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:11-07-06 /PAR70/

/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:ON 07-10-06 IN DEPT, 22, THE DEFENDANT WAIVED TIME AND TODAY'S COURT OF 07-11-06 WAS VACATED AND CONTINUED TO 08-01-06 IN DEPT, 29,/X:ATTY, WOLKIN IS NOT PRESENT,/X:PER JUDGE STEWART THIS MATTER IS NEED NOT BE REPORTED,/

/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS 8 TO 13 UNDER 1385 IS GRANTED,/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN:YOLANDA FLAKES, OFFICER COTTER/EXHMA:1, 1A, A, B & C//HTA1:1 & 7/871D:2,3,4,5 AND 6/X:COUNTS 14,15,16,17,18,19 &20 ARE CERTIFIED TO THE SUPERIOR COURT/BAIL:500,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:BETSY WOLKIN/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/WEAP/DOP//SA1:YOLANDA FLAKES; OLLIE FLAKES III; YOLAND FLAKES DOB 082601/SA2:368 RICHLAND AVE, SF, 94112/BAIL:500,000/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 001/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 10-03-06/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:BETSY WOLKIN/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW//987,2/
